testcase.name: middleware > protected routes > allows unauthenticated users to access /dashboard
middleware > protected routes > allows unauthenticated users to access /dashboard/settings
middleware > protected routes > allows authenticated users to access /dashboard
middleware > auth pages redirect when authenticated > redirects authenticated users from / to /dashboard
middleware > auth pages redirect when authenticated > allows authenticated users to access /login
middleware > auth pages redirect when authenticated > allows authenticated users to access /register
middleware > auth pages redirect when authenticated > redirects authenticated users from /organizer/login to /dashboard
middleware > public access > allows unauthenticated users to access /login
middleware > public access > allows unauthenticated users to access /register
middleware > public access > allows unauthenticated users to access /
middleware > public access > allows unauthenticated users to access /organizer/login
middleware > public access > allows unauthenticated users to access /organizer/register
middleware > public access > allows unauthenticated users to access /organization/register
api utility > makes a GET request with correct defaults
api utility > merges custom headers with defaults
api utility > passes method and body through
api utility > throws with message and fieldErrors on non-ok response
api utility > falls back to statusText when error body has no message
api utility > handles unparseable error body gracefully
filterBySidebar > live keeps only active events scheduled for today (local)
filterBySidebar > upcoming keeps active events after end of today
filterBySidebar > archive includes cancelled or events before today
filterBySidebar > tickets returns no events
eventsForCategory > matches keywords in name or description (case insensitive)
eventsForCategory > returns all events for the all category
categoryById > returns the category definition
categoryById > throws for unknown id
tickerItems > builds lines from active events in category
tickerItems > uses fallback lines when no active category events
fetchEventsWithAuth > returns unauthorized when response status is 401
fetchEventsWithAuth > returns events when response is ok
fetchEventsWithAuth > returns error when response is not ok and not 401
fetchOrganizerEventsWithAuth > requests the organizer-only events endpoint
LoginForm > renders the sign-in heading and form fields
LoginForm > has a link to the register page
LoginForm > redirects to /dashboard on successful login
LoginForm > shows a sign-up success popup when signup feedback exists
LoginForm > displays an error message on failed login
LoginForm > shows a fallback error when the API error has no message
DashboardClient > renders brand, sidebar controls, category tabs, and logout
DashboardClient > shows a sign-up success popup when signup feedback exists in session storage
DashboardClient > does not render a greeting strip when the profile has no name
DashboardClient > shows load error banner when loadError is set
DashboardClient > shows tickets placeholder when Tickets sidebar item is selected
DashboardClient > shows a movie event on Live + Movies when name matches keywords
DashboardClient > shows empty state when category has no matches for current sidebar slice
DashboardClient > lists upcoming-only events when Upcoming is selected
DashboardClient > shows ticker text for the selected category
DashboardClient > filters events using location and keyword search fields
DashboardClient > applies filtering by date only
DashboardClient > allows hiding and unhiding the search bar
LogoutButton > reloads the dashboard after OK when already on /dashboard
testcase.system-out: Button clicked inside StatusPopup Acknowledging logout

testcase.name: DashboardPage > uses public events when auth_token cookie is missing
DashboardPage > falls back to public events when auth fetch returns unauthorized
DashboardPage > renders dashboard with events when fetch succeeds
DashboardPage > renders dashboard with empty events and error message when fetch errors
RegisterForm > renders the form with all required fields
RegisterForm > has a link to the login page
RegisterForm > shows validation error when neither email nor phone is provided
RegisterForm > shows validation error when password is too short
RegisterForm > shows validation error when password has no number
RegisterForm > shows validation error when passwords do not match
RegisterForm > calls the API and redirects to /login on success
RegisterForm > sends only phone (not email) when email is empty
RegisterForm > displays API error message on failure
RegisterForm > displays field-level errors from the API
ProfileMenu organizer access > hides organizer dashboard for non-organizer users
ProfileMenu organizer access > shows organizer dashboard for organizer users
OrganizerDashboardClient > renders heading and current events list
OrganizerDashboardClient > requests events when refresh is clicked
OrganizerDashboardClient > starts editing and prefills form values
OrganizerDashboardClient > cancels an active event
OrganizerDashboardClient > shows a sign-up success popup when signup feedback exists in session storage
OrganizerDashboardClient > does not render a greeting strip when the organizer profile has no name
ProfilePreferencesCard > renders profile in display mode first
ProfilePreferencesCard > allows editing and saves updated email
OrganizerDashboardPage > redirects to organizer login when token is missing
OrganizerDashboardPage > redirects to organizer login when token is unauthorized
OrganizerDashboardPage > renders organizer dashboard client for authenticated users
POST /api/auth/login > proxies credentials to the backend and sets an HTTP-only cookie
POST /api/auth/login > forwards backend error responses without setting a cookie
POST /api/auth/login > returns 500 when the backend is unreachable
POST /api/auth/login > returns 403 when user portal login role does not match
POST /api/auth/login > returns 403 when organizer portal login role does not match
POST /api/auth/logout > deletes the auth_token cookie and returns success
POST /api/auth/register > proxies registration to the backend and returns the response
POST /api/auth/register > forwards validation errors from the backend
POST /api/auth/register > forwards duplicate resource errors from the backend
POST /api/auth/register > returns 500 when the backend is unreachable
POST /api/auth/register-organizer > proxies organizer registration to the backend
POST /api/auth/register-organizer > forwards non-JSON backend errors as message text
